name: Crunchy Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bean sprouts; fresh OR 1 can Bean sprouts; drained (16 oz)
1 can Water chestnuts; sliced, drained (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
1. In a large bowl, combine spinach, bean sprouts, water chestnuts, eggs, bacon, and onion.
2. In a bottle or jar, combine all dressing ingredients: 1/2 cup brown sugar (packed), 1/2 cup vegetable oil, 1/3 cup vinegar, 1/3 cup ketchup, and 1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce. Cover and shake well to mix.
3. Just before serving, pour the dressing over the salad and toss.
